items.title: Newsom proposes national levy instead...
items.summary: California Gov. Gavin Newsom on Friday proposed a national tax on billionaires that he says is the first part of an “economic reset for America” agenda, which aides explicitly say is part of his considering to launch a presidential campaign.
items.titleZh: 纽瑟姆提议改为征收国家税。..
items.summaryZh: 加利福尼亚州州长加文·纽瑟姆周五提议对亿万富翁征收国家税，他说这是“美国经济重置”议程的第一部分，助手明确表示，这是他考虑发起总统竞选的一部分。

items.title: California built a tool to catch AI killing jobs
items.summary: California has built the first state tool to watch for AI wiping out jobs. The early read: no mass layoffs yet, but warning signs are flashing in the Bay Area and among college-educated workers. Everyone argues about whether AI is killing jobs. Almost nobody …
items.titleZh: 加州建立了一个工具来捕捉AI杀死的工作
items.summaryZh: 加利福尼亚州已经建立了第一个观察人工智能消灭就业机会的州工具。早期报道：目前还没有大规模裁员，但湾区和受过大学教育的工人中正在出现警告信号。每个人都在争论人工智能是否正在扼杀就业机会。几乎没有人…

items.title: Jeremy Grantham says this is 'the most expensive market in 'American history'
items.summary: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.
items.titleZh: Jeremy Grantham表示，这是“美国历史上最昂贵的市场”
items.summaryZh: Jeremy Grantham表示，围绕人工智能的估值飙升使美国股市在历史上变得昂贵。

items.title: Anthropic’s Mythos mess is only getting worse
items.summary: It's been two weeks since Anthropic took its Mythos-class models offline after a Friday evening ultimatum from the Trump administration. The company sprang into action immediately, sending a barrage of executives to Washington, DC. But updates have been suspi…
items.titleZh: Anthropic的神话混乱只会变得更糟
items.summaryZh: 在特朗普政府周五晚间发出最后通牒后，Anthropic将其Mythos类模特下线已经两周了。该公司立即采取行动，向华盛顿特区派遣了大批高管。但最新消息令人怀疑…

items.title: Tesla settles lawsuit over fatal ‘Full Self-Driving’ pedestrian crash
items.summary:
Tesla has quietly settled the lawsuit brought by the family of a pedestrian killed by a Model Y running “Full Self-Driving,” according to Bloomberg. The terms were not disclosed.
It’s the first known pedestrian death tied to FSD — and the same crash that trig…
items.titleZh: 特斯拉就致命的“全自动驾驶”行人碰撞案达成和解
items.summaryZh: 据彭博社报道，特斯拉已悄然解决了一名因驾驶“全自动驾驶”的Model Y而死亡的行人的家人提起的诉讼。相关条款尚未披露。

items.title: Tesla Semi slides on ice and impressively regains control
items.summary:
Tesla’s Semi program lead Dan Priestley shared a video of the electric truck holding its line on icy winter surfaces, sliding under control rather than skidding out of it.
The clip is a rare look at the Tesla Semi’s Vehicle Dynamics Control (VDC) system doing…
items.titleZh: 特斯拉Semi在冰上滑行，令人印象深刻地重新获得了控制权
items.summaryZh: 特斯拉的Semi项目负责人Dan Priestley分享了一段电动卡车在冰冷的冬季路面上保持路线的视频，在控制下滑动而不是滑出。

items.title: Robotaxis drives miles just to get cleaned and charged; this new startup wants to fix that
items.summary: Aseon Labs, which came out of Y Combinator's 2026 spring cohort, has raised $10 million from Crane Venture Partners and others.
items.titleZh: 机器人出租车行驶数英里只是为了清洁和充电；这家新公司想解决这个问题
items.summaryZh: Aseon Labs来自Y Combinator 2026年春季团队，已从Crane Venture Partners和其他公司筹集了1000万美元。

items.title: Wall Street's IPO revival hasn't reached dot-com euphoria levels, Goldman Sachs says
items.summary: U.S. IPO issuance has rebounded sharply in 2026, but the bank said the current surge lacks the deal volume and speculative excess that defined the dot-com era.
items.titleZh: 高盛表示，华尔街的IPO复苏还没有达到互联网公司的兴奋水平
items.summaryZh: 美国IPO发行量在2026年大幅反弹，但该行表示，目前的激增缺乏定义互联网时代的交易量和投机过剩。

items.title: The best way to stand out in an AI hiring market may be surprisingly old-fashioned, a recruitment CEO says
items.summary: As AI floods recruiters with similar applications, one recruitment CEO shares his tips for getting noticed.
items.titleZh: 一位招聘首席执行官表示，在人工智能招聘市场脱颖而出的最佳方式可能是令人惊讶的老式方式
items.summaryZh: 随着人工智能向招聘人员大量提供类似的应用程序，一位招聘首席执行官分享了他获得关注的技巧。
